layout_note: Blank Schedule A grid form page with printed column headers (Block A Assets/Income Sources; Block B Value of Asset columns A-M; Block C Type of Income; Block D Amount of Income columns I-XII; Block E Transaction). Contains only the three pre-printed grey example rows (Mega Corp Stock / Simon & Schuster / ABC Hedge Fund) and the filer's notation 'Please see the attached'. No filer asset data on this page; actual holdings are in the attached typed tables on following pages.
